meaning: n.裙衬,带衬的裙,四周鼓出的裙
examples: Sales: plastic products, racks, crinoline, clothing.
Manufacturing sales: clothing, clothing textiles; sales: plastic products, racks, crinoline, clothing.
Even the cage crinoline, that mercifully reduced the number of petticoats, allowed air to blow around a woman's legs.
She made me dresses with big crinoline skirts and watched as I played soccer in them.
The gown featured French seamed crinoline borders, which cascaded into a dramatic cathedral train finished in the lace, with accents of a peacock-feathered design.
